chunks.text: Company Overview: Amazon is on the lookout for the curious, those who think big and want to define the world of tomorrow. At Amazon, you will grow into the high impact, visionary person you know you're ready to be. Every day will be filled with exciting new challenges, developing new skills, and achieving personal growth. How often can you say that your work changes the world? At Amazon, you’ll say it often. Join us and define tomorrow.

Role Overview: A Business Analyst will own the creation, expansion and maintenance of a suite of analytics reports, visual dashboards and automation tools that provide insights to our leaders for taking decisions that impact customer or selling partner experience. We are looking for a customer-obsessed innovator, comfortable with ambiguity, with strong attention to detail, an ability to work in a fast-paced and ever-changing environment, and an ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams. They will have excellent oral and written communication skills, a focus to meet tight deadlines, multi-task, and prioritize work. The Business Analyst will create, support and continuously improve reports and metrics that support the business operations. They will convert data into digestible business intelligence and actionable information using tools like Quicksight/Tableau. The Business Analyst will dive deep into large data sets to answer specific business questions using Excel, SQL and other data manipulation languages. They will work directly with business teams to utilize metrics and analysis to drive productivity improvement and customer experience. They will identify peculiar behavior or trends from the data, surface insights and provide objective interpretation of the insights that enables executive decision making. They will create small to medium complexity automations to reduce repetitive manual work. The Business Analyst will use the following tools - SQL (Oracle and Redshift), Excel Advanced VBA, Tableau/Quicksight, and report scheduling tools (internal). Basic Qualifications: - Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics or related field - 0-4 years of prior years prior work experience - Ability to create complex SQL Queries joining multiple datasets, ETL DW concepts. - Knowledge of Python, VBA, Macros, Selenium scripts - Demonstrate strength in analytical skills – has ability to ask right questions, analyze data, draw conclusion by making appropriate assumptions - Working knowledge of Data Visualization tools such as Quick Sight / Tableau / Power BI or other BI packages - Advanced ability to draw insights from data and clearly communicate them to the stakeholders and senior management as required Preferred Qualifications: - Experience using very large datasets - Prior experience in a BI role with a technology company or financial institution Amazon is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Role Overview: The Data Intern role involves working as part of a team to analyze large datasets and derive insights to support strategic decision-making. The intern will develop dashboards and visualizations, collaborate with cross-functional teams, assist in building and validating predictive models, and contribute to data quality assessments. The intern will also learn practical experience in analyzing real-world datasets, machine learning algorithms, data visualization tools, and cloud-based data platforms. Role Overview: The SW Compiler Verification Intern will be responsible for innovation, compiler test development, process improvement, test automation, test operations, and analysis. The intern will demonstrate a keen interest in emerging tech trends, particularly in AI and ML, and a desire to apply these technologies in innovative projects. The intern will develop and review test plans, implement test cases, automate tests, integrate tests into NVIDIA test management frameworks, port 3rd party testing, and author test reports. chunks.text: Company Overview: NOVA 2025 is a research and development initiative by Sabic Research & Technology Pvt Ltd. to explore and develop advanced technologies in the areas of Materials Science, Photonics, and Process Engineering. The initiative focuses on creating innovative solutions for various industries, including Automotive, Aerospace, and Telecommunications. The goal is to provide cutting-edge technology solutions to meet the evolving needs of these industries. The initiative offers various internships for students pursuing their Master's degree in relevant fields. The internships provide an opportunity to work on real-world projects, learn from experienced professionals, and gain hands-on experience in the latest technologies. The duration of the internships ranges from 2 months to 12 months, and the stipend offered varies based on the project and the intern's performance. The projects offered under NOVA 2025 cover a wide range of areas, including surface feature sensitivity in RF applications, web analytics for customer facing portals, moisture absorption study of polymer materials, empirical procedure for predictive modeling of fatigue failure for filled resins at application level, and performance prediction of optical lenses & waveguides. The projects require a strong foundation in the relevant field, analytical and numerical skills, and the ability to work in a team environment. To apply for the internships, students need to submit their resume and a cover letter expressing their interest in the project and their qualifications. The initiative provides a platform for students to learn from experienced professionals, expand their knowledge, and build a strong foundation for their future careers.

Role Overview: The role involves understanding the physics of wave interaction with different surfaces features, performing literature search, benchmarking, and baseline studies/analysis, learning the predictive tools required for the project, developing predictive models to understand and evaluate the effect of these surface features for specified applications, working with team members to prototype and test the design concept, validating the CAE model with the test results, and documentation and reporting. The project focuses on RF communication and involves researching the behavior of EM waves on different surfaces and developing methods to predict the system level performance with these features for specified applications. Strong fundamentals of RF communication and analytical and numerical methods for predicting RF performance are required for this project.
